title: galium trifidum subsp. tinctorium
intro: Galium trifidum subsp. tinctorium, also known as Woodruff or Sweet Woodruid, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galium trifidum subsp. tinctorium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
